mapper.select: SELECT ja.id, ja.job_id, ja.user_id, ja.resume, ja.cover_letter, ja.status, ja.feedback, ja.apply_time, ja.process_time, j.id as j_id, j.title as j_title, j.department as j_department, j.location as j_location, u.id as u_id, u.name as u_name, u.email as u_email, u.phone as u_phone FROM job_application ja LEFT JOIN job j ON ja.job_id = j.id LEFT JOIN user u ON ja.user_id = u.id ORDER BY ja.apply_time DESC

SELECT ja.id, ja.job_id, ja.user_id, ja.resume, ja.cover_letter, ja.status, ja.feedback, ja.apply_time, ja.process_time, j.id as j_id, j.title as j_title, j.department as j_department, j.location as j_location, u.id as u_id, u.name as u_name, u.email as u_email, u.phone as u_phone FROM job_application ja LEFT JOIN job j ON ja.job_id = j.id LEFT JOIN user u ON ja.user_id = u.id WHERE ja.id = #{id}

SELECT ja.id, ja.job_id, ja.user_id, ja.resume, ja.cover_letter, ja.status, ja.feedback, ja.apply_time, ja.process_time, j.id as j_id, j.title as j_title, j.department as j_department, j.location as j_location, u.id as u_id, u.name as u_name, u.email as u_email, u.phone as u_phone FROM job_application ja LEFT JOIN job j ON ja.job_id = j.id LEFT JOIN user u ON ja.user_id = u.id WHERE ja.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY ja.apply_time DESC

SELECT ja.id, ja.job_id, ja.user_id, ja.resume, ja.cover_letter, ja.status, ja.feedback, ja.apply_time, ja.process_time, j.id as j_id, j.title as j_title, j.department as j_department, j.location as j_location, u.id as u_id, u.name as u_name, u.email as u_email, u.phone as u_phone FROM job_application ja LEFT JOIN job j ON ja.job_id = j.id LEFT JOIN user u ON ja.user_id = u.id WHERE ja.job_id = #{jobId} ORDER BY ja.apply_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO job_application (job_id, user_id, resume, cover_letter, status, apply_time) VALUES (#{jobId}, #{userId}, #{resume}, #{coverLetter}, #{status}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE job_application SET status = #{status}, feedback = #{feedback}, process_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM job_application WHERE status = 'pending'
